import React from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Users, Activity, Target, ShieldCheck, ChevronUp, MoreVertical, Search, Sprout } from 'lucide-react'; export default function AdminDashboard() { const stats = [ { title: 'Total Users', value: '14,284', grow: '+12%', icon: Users, color: '#3B82F6' }, { title: 'Scans Performed', value: '89,431', grow: '+24%', icon: Activity, color: '#8B5CF6' }, { title: 'Active Predictions', value: '432/hr', grow: '+4%', icon: Target, color: '#10B981' }, { title: 'Avg Confidence', value: '96.2%', grow: '+0.5%', icon: ShieldCheck, color: '#F59E0B' }, ]; const recentUsers = [ { name: 'Sarah Jenkins', email: 'sarah.j@farmcorp.com', location: 'California, US', status: 'Active' }, { name: 'Michael Chen', email: 'm.chen@agridata.io', location: 'Ontario, CAN', status: 'Active' }, { name: 'David Ortez', email: 'd.ortez@valleofarms.mx', location: 'Sonora, MEX', status: 'Offline' }, { name: 'Emily Watts', email: 'emily@wattsfamily.ag', location: 'Iowa, US', status: 'Active' }, ]; return (
{/* Dashboard Header */}
Admin Operations

Platform Analytics

Monitor usage, track predictions, and manage users globally.

{/* Content */}
{/* Top 4 Stats */}
{stats.map((stat, i) => (
{stat.grow}

{stat.value}

{stat.title}

 ))}
{/* Users Table */}

Recent Users

{recentUsers.map((user, i) => ( ))}
Name Location Status Actions
{user.name} {user.email}
{user.location} {user.status}
); }

import React from 'react'; import { Camera, ChevronRight, Wind, Droplets, Scan, MapPin, Sun, Activity, CheckCircle2, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react'; import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; export default function Home() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const MOCK_FIELDS = [ { id: 1, name: 'Tomato Field Alpha', date: 'Oct 24, 2026', status: 'Requires Attention', healthy: false, img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1592841200221-a6898f307baa?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=200&h=200' }, { id: 2, name: 'Potato Harvest B', date: 'Oct 23, 2026', status: '98% Healthy', healthy: true, img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518972559570-7ac3f2951dc8?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=200&h=200' }, { id: 3, name: 'Vineyard Section 4', date: 'Oct 20, 2026', status: '99% Healthy', healthy: true, img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1595841696677-6489af3f2740?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=200&h=200' }, ]; return (
{/* Header Area */}

Dashboard

Monitor your harvest health and AI prediction history.

Tucson, AZ

24??C

JS
{/* Left Column */}
{/* Main Call to Action Header */} navigate('/upload')} style={{ background: '#0F172A', borderRadius: '32px', padding: '3rem', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'flex-start', cursor: 'pointer', position: 'relative', overflow: 'hidden', boxShadow: '0 20px 40px -10px rgba(15,23,42,0.3)', transition: 'all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)' }} onMouseOver={e => { e.currentTarget.style.transform='translateY(-6px)'; e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow='0 30px 50px -15px rgba(15,23,42,0.4)'; }} onMouseOut={e => { e.currentTarget.style.transform='translateY(0)'; e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow='0 20px 40px -10px rgba(15,23,42,0.3)'; }} > {/* Background gradient orb */}

Perform New
Diagnostic Scan

Upload a plant photo and let AI identify diseases instantly.

Scan Now
{/* Environmental Sensors */}

Moisture

87%

Wind Speed

12km/h

{/* Right Column (Recent Scans) */}

Recent Fields

View All
All Fields
e.currentTarget.style.background='#F1F5F9'} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background='white'}>Critical
e.currentTarget.style.background='#F1F5F9'} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background='white'}>Healthy
{MOCK_FIELDS.map((field, i) => (
{e.currentTarget.style.background='#F8FAFC'; e.currentTarget.style.transform='translateX(6px)'}} onMouseOut={e=>{e.currentTarget.style.background='transparent'; e.currentTarget.style.transform='translateX(0)'}}>
{field.name}
{field.date}
{field.healthy ? : } {field.status}
))}
); }
